review_text: On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange. During the same time, it was available for trading on other brokerage platforms. This delay prevented me from entering at my intended price. For active traders, even a few minutes matter. I hope necessary improvements are made to avoid such delays in future listings.

am filing this as a serious complaint regarding Groww’s options trading platform. The strike price of option contracts frequently fails to update in real time. While the chart continues to move, the actual strike price remains frozen for 5–10 minutes. In derivatives trading, even seconds matter. A delay of several minutes is unacceptable and directly impacts trading decisions. Due to this issue, I have suffered financial losses because I was unable to exit my position at the correct market price
